prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
# Rainy Sunday Lunch for Old Friends

## Starter
Roasted Butternut Squash Soup with Sage Croutons and Brown Butter Drizzle

## Main Course
Braised Short Ribs with Red Wine Reduction
Creamy Parmesan Polenta
Glazed Rainbow Carrots with Thyme

## Dessert
Warm Apple Crumble with Vanilla Bean Ice Cream and Salted Caramel Sauce
